---
name: retro-capture
description: Capture process learnings after a milestone or release and turn them into workflow improvements. Use when a delivery cycle ends and the team wants to improve the template, skills, or operating model.
---

Use this skill after meaningful delivery work, not during normal planning.

## Goal

Feed real delivery learnings back into the workflow so the template improves over time.

## Capture

- what worked well
- what slowed planning or delivery
- missing automation or skills
- workflow or template changes to make next

## Output rules

- Keep the retro concrete.
- Tie improvement ideas back to specific friction the team felt.
- Convert repeatable improvements into updates to the workflow model, skills, scripts, or templates.

## Guardrails

- Do not turn the retro into blame tracking.
- Do not capture vague complaints without a proposed change.
- Prefer actionable improvements over broad retrospectives.
